question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NftAllowanceService.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getNftAllowances()] Can an unprivileged external user tamper with the accountId path parameter in the request to resolve to a different account's EntityId via EntityService.lookup(), causing the mirror node to return NFT allowances belonging to an arbitrary victim account without any authentication check?
